description: timberland's water-resistant Whiteledge collection of backpacks provide functionality and comfort for long days out on the trails. The Whiteledge Backpack features a laptop sleeve, plenty of pockets to organize all your gear, padded shoulder straps to gain center of gravity while hiking, and a media pocket to let you listen to music when the sounds of the backcountry aren't enough for you. Height: 45.5 cmWidth: 14cmDepth: 32 cmCapacity: 17 litresWater-resistant nylon and polyester making it mildly waterproofInternal padded sleeve fits a 15-inch laptop to carry for official purposesInterior organization for easy carryContoured EVA back foam for ergonomical FitPadded shoulder straps to distribute weight evenlyDaisy chain with bungee for extra loadTricot lined media pocket with portPolypropylene webbing to make the pack water resistantCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
